name: The Daily Wee
author: pifreak
description: Master the Wee Joker with the chaotic Erratic Deck! Find curated seeds where Wee Joker appears early, maximize your 2s, and compete for the highest chip count.
tutorial: Start a New Run with Erratic Deck on White Stake. Use the provided seed. Find Wee Joker in Ante 1 or 2, play as many 2s as possible to power it up. Win Ante 8 and check your Wee Joker's +Chips in the Ante 9 shop!
